_metadata.purpose: Edify verification tool - factual descriptions for top universities
_metadata.rule: Only verifiable facts: founding year, location, university type, what they were originally founded for. No subjective claims, no rankings, no 'top X', no fabricated specifics.
_metadata.universities_skipped: IGNOU, BITS Pilani, OP Jindal, Annamalai, IKGPTU, SRM - not currently in database. Add to Excel master and re-sync, then add descriptions in a follow-up.
_metadata.note: 26 universities filtered to 24 verified entries. Universities present in DB but without descriptions yet (skipped to avoid hallucination): Birla Institute of Technology (Mesra), D.Y. Patil (Navi Mumbai). To be added later when verified.

descriptions.name: Manipal Academy of Higher Education
descriptions.about: Founded in 1953 in Manipal, Karnataka. Granted Deemed-to-be University status. Granted Institution of Eminence status by the Government of India in 2018.
descriptions.known_for: Originally established as a medical college (Kasturba Medical College). Programmes have since expanded to include engineering, management, and life sciences.
descriptions.online_context: Online programmes are delivered through the Online Manipal platform, alongside Manipal University Jaipur and Sikkim Manipal University. Each is a legally separate UGC-DEB approved university.

descriptions.name: Amity (brand-merged)
descriptions.about: Amity offers online programmes through two separate UGC-DEB approved universities: Amity University Uttar Pradesh (Noida), founded in 2005, and Amity University Rajasthan (Jaipur). Both are State Private Universities.
descriptions.known_for: The Amity Education Group operates multiple universities across Indian states, established by the Ritnand Balved Education Foundation.
descriptions.online_context: Different online programmes are approved by different Amity entities. The approving entity issues your degree certificate. Confirm which Amity entity approves your specific programme before enrolling.

descriptions.name: NMIMS
descriptions.about: Founded in 1981 in Mumbai. Granted Deemed-to-be University status in 2003. Operates as SVKM's Narsee Monjee Institute of Management Studies under the Shri Vile Parle Kelavani Mandal trust.
descriptions.known_for: Originally established as a management institute, with the School of Business Management as its founding school.
descriptions.online_context: Online programmes are delivered through NMIMS Global Access School. As a Deemed-to-be University, AICTE approval applies to online MBA and MCA programmes per regulation.

descriptions.name: Symbiosis International
descriptions.about: Granted Deemed-to-be University status in 2002. Located in Pune. The Symbiosis Society itself was established in 1971.
descriptions.known_for: Operates multiple constituent institutes across India.
descriptions.online_context: Online programmes are delivered through Symbiosis Centre for Distance Learning (SCDL) and Symbiosis Centre for Online and Digital Learning. As a Deemed-to-be University, AICTE approval applies to online MBA and MCA per regulation.

descriptions.name: Lovely Professional University
descriptions.about: Founded in 2005 in Punjab as a State Private University, established under an Act of the Punjab state legislature.
descriptions.known_for: Programmes span engineering, management, agriculture, design, and pharmacy.
descriptions.online_context: Online programmes are delivered through LPU Online. As a State Private University, AICTE approval is not legally required for online MBA and MCA per UGC guidelines.

descriptions.name: Chandigarh University
descriptions.about: Founded in 2012 in Mohali, Punjab. State Private University, established under the Punjab State Legislative Assembly. Part of the broader CU Group.
descriptions.known_for: Programmes span engineering, management, law, computer applications, and pharmacy.
descriptions.online_context: Online programmes are delivered through CU Online. As a State Private University, AICTE approval is not legally required for online MBA and MCA per UGC guidelines.

descriptions.name: Jain (Deemed-to-be University)
descriptions.about: Granted Deemed-to-be University status in 2009. Located in Bengaluru. Evolved from Sri Bhagawan Mahaveer Jain College, established in 1990.
descriptions.known_for: Operates multiple constituent schools across business, engineering, sciences, and humanities.
descriptions.online_context: Online programmes are delivered through Online JAIN. As a Deemed-to-be University, AICTE approval applies to online MBA and MCA programmes per regulation.

descriptions.name: Jamia Hamdard
descriptions.about: Granted Deemed-to-be University status in 1989. Located in New Delhi. Evolved from the Hamdard Foundation established by Hakim Abdul Hameed.
descriptions.known_for: Originally established with a focus on Unani medicine and pharmacy education. Programmes have since expanded to include management, computer applications, and Islamic studies.
descriptions.online_context: Online programmes are governed under UGC-DEB. As a Deemed-to-be University, AICTE approval applies to online MBA and MCA programmes per regulation.

descriptions.name: Manipal University Jaipur
descriptions.about: Founded in 2011 in Rajasthan as a State Private University, established under the Rajasthan state legislature Act. Part of the Manipal Education Group but a legally separate entity from Manipal Academy of Higher Education in Karnataka.
descriptions.known_for: Operates as the Rajasthan campus of the Manipal brand.
descriptions.online_context: Online programmes are delivered through Online Manipal alongside MAHE and Sikkim Manipal. As a State Private University, AICTE is not legally required for online MBA per UGC guidelines.

descriptions.name: Sikkim Manipal University
descriptions.about: Founded in 1995 in Sikkim as a State Private University. Established as a public-private partnership between the Government of Sikkim and the Manipal Group.
descriptions.known_for: First public-private partnership university model in India. Operates Sikkim Manipal Institute of Medical Sciences alongside engineering and management programmes.
descriptions.online_context: Online programmes are delivered through Online Manipal. As a State Private University, AICTE is not legally required for online MBA per UGC guidelines, though SMU's online MCA programme holds explicit AICTE approval.

descriptions.name: University of Petroleum and Energy Studies
descriptions.about: Founded in 2003 in Dehradun, Uttarakhand. State Private University, established by an Act of the Uttarakhand State Legislature.
descriptions.known_for: Originally founded with a focus on the energy and petroleum sector. Programmes have since expanded to include engineering, management, design, and law.
descriptions.online_context: Online programmes are delivered through UPES Online. As a State Private University, AICTE is not legally required for online MBA per UGC guidelines.

descriptions.name: Galgotias University
descriptions.about: Founded in 2011 in Greater Noida, Uttar Pradesh, as a State Private University, established by an Act of the Uttar Pradesh state legislature. Evolved from Galgotias Educational Institutions.
descriptions.known_for: Programmes span engineering, computer applications, and management.
descriptions.online_context: Online programmes are delivered through Galgotias Online. As a State Private University, AICTE is not legally required for online MBA per UGC guidelines.

descriptions.name: Bharati Vidyapeeth
descriptions.about: Granted Deemed-to-be University status in 1996. Headquartered in Pune, Maharashtra. Evolved from Bharati Vidyapeeth, an educational society founded in 1964 by Patangrao Kadam.
descriptions.known_for: Operates constituent institutes across medicine, dentistry, engineering, management, and computer applications.
descriptions.online_context: Online programmes include MBA, MCA, BBA, BCA, and BCom. As a Deemed-to-be University, AICTE approval applies to online MBA and MCA per regulation.

descriptions.name: Dr. D.Y. Patil Vidyapeeth (Pune)
descriptions.about: Founded in 2003. Located in Pune as a Deemed-to-be University. Part of the broader D.Y. Patil education family, which includes multiple legally distinct institutions across Pune, Mumbai, and Navi Mumbai.
descriptions.known_for: Originally established with a focus on medicine and dentistry. Programmes have since expanded to include biotechnology, management, and computer applications.
descriptions.online_context: Online programmes include MBA and MCA at the postgraduate level. As a Deemed-to-be University, AICTE approval applies to online MBA and MCA per regulation.

descriptions.name: Vellore Institute of Technology
descriptions.about: Founded in 1984 as Vellore Engineering College. Granted Deemed-to-be University status in 2001. Operates campuses in Vellore, Chennai, Bhopal, Amaravati, and Andhra Pradesh.
descriptions.known_for: Originally established as an engineering college. Admissions to on-campus engineering programmes are conducted through the VITEEE entrance exam.
descriptions.online_context: Online programmes are delivered through VIT Online (VITOL). As a Deemed-to-be University, AICTE approval applies to online MBA and MCA per regulation.

descriptions.name: Christ (Deemed to be University)
descriptions.about: Granted Deemed-to-be University status in 2008. Located in Bengaluru. Evolved from Christ College, established in 1969 by the Carmelites of Mary Immaculate (CMI).
descriptions.known_for: Operates multiple campuses across Bengaluru, Delhi NCR, and Pune. Programmes span commerce, management, humanities, and sciences.
descriptions.online_context: As a Deemed-to-be University, AICTE approval applies to online MBA and MCA programmes per regulation.

descriptions.name: Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham University
descriptions.about: Founded in 2003 with headquarters in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, as a Deemed-to-be University. Granted Institution of Eminence status by the Government of India. Operates campuses in Coimbatore, Bengaluru, Kochi, Mysore, Amritapuri, Chennai, and Faridabad.
descriptions.known_for: Established with engineering, medical sciences, and Sanskrit-related programmes.
descriptions.online_context: Online programmes are delivered through Amrita Online. As a Deemed-to-be University, AICTE approval applies to online MBA and MCA per regulation.

descriptions.name: Shoolini University of Biotechnology and Management Sciences
descriptions.about: Founded in 2009 in Solan, Himachal Pradesh, as a State Private University, established under the Himachal Pradesh state Act.
descriptions.known_for: Originally established with a focus on biotechnology, pharmacy, and applied life sciences.
descriptions.online_context: Online programmes are delivered through Shoolini Online. As a State Private University, AICTE is not legally required for online MBA per UGC guidelines.

descriptions.name: Andhra University
descriptions.about: Founded in 1926 in Visakhapatnam by an Act of the Madras Presidency. State Public University. One of the older universities in southern India, predating Indian independence.
descriptions.known_for: A teaching, residential, and affiliating university with constituent colleges across coastal Andhra Pradesh.
descriptions.online_context: Online programmes are delivered through the Directorate of Distance Education. As a State Public University, AICTE is not legally required for online MBA per UGC guidelines.

descriptions.name: Alagappa University
descriptions.about: Founded in 1985 in Karaikudi, Tamil Nadu, by an Act of the Tamil Nadu state legislature. State Public University.
descriptions.known_for: Operates as a teaching and affiliating university with a distance education programme.
descriptions.online_context: Online programmes are delivered through the Directorate of Distance Education. As a State Public University, AICTE is not legally required for online MBA per UGC guidelines.

descriptions.name: Bharathiar University
descriptions.about: Founded in 1982 in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, by an Act of the Tamil Nadu state legislature. Named after the Tamil poet Subramania Bharati. State Public University.
descriptions.known_for: Affiliates colleges across western Tamil Nadu and runs a distance education programme.
descriptions.online_context: Online programmes are delivered through the School of Distance Education. As a State Public University, AICTE is not legally required for online MBA per UGC guidelines.

descriptions.name: Kurukshetra University
descriptions.about: Founded in 1956 in Kurukshetra, Haryana, by an Act of the Punjab state legislature. Became part of Haryana following state reorganisation in 1966. State Public University.
descriptions.known_for: Affiliates colleges across northern Haryana and runs a distance education centre.
descriptions.online_context: Online programmes are delivered through the Directorate of Distance Education. As a State Public University, AICTE is not legally required for online MBA per UGC guidelines.

descriptions.name: University of Madras
descriptions.about: Founded in 1857 in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. State Public University. One of the three oldest universities in India, established alongside the Universities of Calcutta and Bombay.
descriptions.known_for: Affiliates colleges across northern Tamil Nadu. Operates the Institute of Distance Education.
descriptions.online_context: Online programmes are delivered through the Institute of Distance Education. As a State Public University, AICTE is not legally required for online MBA per UGC guidelines.

descriptions.name: Mangalayatan University
descriptions.about: Founded in 2006 in Aligarh, Uttar Pradesh, as a State Private University, established under the Uttar Pradesh state legislature.
descriptions.known_for: Operates with a wide range of UG and PG programmes including online and distance learning.
descriptions.online_context: Online programmes are delivered through Mangalayatan Online. As a State Private University, AICTE is not legally required for online MBA per UGC guidelines.
